title: urginea maritima subsp. maura
intro: Urginea maritima subsp. maura, also known as the Mediterranean squill, is a subspecies of the Urginea maritima plant, a perennial bulbous plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and treating wounds. Urginea maritima subsp. maura can be prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
